1.title: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesVisible Sum
1.query:
timeseries approximate_number_of_messages_visible_sum = avg(cloud.aws.sqs.approximate_number_of_messages_visible_sum),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(approximate_number_of_messages_visible_sum) desc
| limit 20
